prompt: We just figured out why the API was randomly returning 503s — the connection pool size was set to 5 but we were seeing 50+ concurrent requests. Fixed it by bumping pool_size to 100 and pool_timeout to 30s. Save this to the knowledge base.

assertions.text: KB markdown file was created/updated under a kb/ directory
File contains a ## section heading relevant to connection pools or 503 errors
Content captures the key facts: pool_size, value 100, pool_timeout, value 30
Agent confirmed what was saved and the file path
No unsubstituted template placeholders (e.g. {{topic}}) left in the output file
